case_title: HOWELL, RICHARD C. VS INTRANSIT TRAVEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOWELL, RICHARD C. AS TO DEFENDANT INTRANSIT TRAVEL LONERGAN, JOHN R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWELL, RICHARD C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTRANSIT TRAVEL LONERGAN, JOHN R.
